home.title: Country Flag Matching Game | World Quiz
home.description: Play a country flag matching game, test world map skills, and climb global leaderboards in World Quiz.

leaderboards.title: Flag Match Leaderboards | World Quiz
leaderboards.description: See top scores for flag match, cards match, and guess country. Compare daily and all-time rankings.

map.title: Interactive World Map Explorer | World Quiz
map.description: Explore countries, capitals, and flags on an interactive world map built for fast geography practice.

countries.title: Country Encyclopedia and Flags | World Quiz
countries.description: Browse country facts, flags, capitals, languages, and neighbors in the World Quiz country encyclopedia.

flagMatch.title: Flag Matching Game | Flag Match World Quiz
flagMatch.description: Play flag matching game in world or region mode. Train memory and improve speed in every flag match round.

shapeMatch.title: Cards Match Geography Game | World Quiz
shapeMatch.description: Match flags, countries, capitals, and shapes against the clock in this fast geography cards game.

physicalGeo.title: Physical Geography Quiz Game | World Quiz
physicalGeo.description: Locate mountains, rivers, lakes, deserts, and seas in a fast physical geography quiz challenge.

guessCountry.title: Guess the Country Map Quiz | World Quiz
guessCountry.description: Find the hidden country in five attempts using distance, direction, and region hints on the world map.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions | World Quiz
terms.description: Read the World Quiz terms and conditions, account rules, and fair-play requirements.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | World Quiz
privacy.description: Learn how World Quiz handles personal data, cookies, and account information.

auth.title: Sign In to World Quiz
auth.description: Sign in or create your World Quiz account to save scores and join leaderboards.

setNickname.title: Set Your Nickname | World Quiz
setNickname.description: Choose your public World Quiz nickname for scores, rankings, and profile display.

settings.title: Account Settings | World Quiz
settings.description: Manage language, nickname, and profile settings for your World Quiz account.

notFound.title: Page Not Found | World Quiz
notFound.description: This page could not be found. Explore World Quiz games, maps, and country encyclopedia.

game.startHint: Start by tapping any country on the map

mapPanel.body: Hints unlock each round: continent/subregion first, then population/area, then direction and exact distance.
